query: wise Rewards complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Wise  is rated "Excellent" with 4.3 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
I have used Wise for years, but my recent experience has been deeply frustrating and unacceptable. My transfer was stopped, and I was told to “fix” the transfer and provide additional documents, even though my bank had authorized the payment. When I contacted Wise support, they told me the issue was that my bank declined the payment and that Wise could not override it.

That explanation does not match what I experienced. From my side, the bank authorization went through, and the problem appeared only after Wise asked me to provide more documents. This is not the first time I have faced this kind of unnecessary delay and repeated verification issue with Wise. [...] For someone relying on international transfers, this kind of uncertainty is extremely stressful. You expect a money transfer service to be reliable, clear, and accountable. Instead, I was left going in circles between Wise and the bank, with no proper resolution. I eventually had to cancel the transaction and ask for a refund.

Based on my experience, I would not recommend Wise to anyone who needs dependable international money transfers. The service may work when everything goes smoothly, but when there is a problem, the support process is frustrating, confusing, and not good enough for a financial service handling people’s money.

July 2, 2026

results.title: Wise 2026 Review: Expert Test & 200+ Customer Ratings
results.content: I have never had such a frustrating experience. This is by far the most dysfunctional service I have ever encountered. Nothing works on their end – NOTHING. Customer Service only knows to say, “let me check into this” until you get frustrated and end the chat. I’ve wasted 4 hours of my life with Wise today and refuse to waste another minute. I heard from Wise in response to my review. They told me to be patient and to try to use phone or email instead of chat. The reason I had to use chat was because when I tried to use the phone option – my preference – the website instructs to push the button for Chat and answer the ‘instant’ call. I NEVER received a call. After trying this 4 times with no return call, the only button worth trying was chat. Its impossible to reach this service by phone, [...] In my opinion, having experienced Wise when something goes wrong, it really goes wrong. My support ticket is \\\\\\\\\\4, and I lodged a formal complaint. On 25 Feb 26, we questioned a “late” payment, to be informed by “Augusto” (one of many different agents) that the money has been repatriated to the payer and “this was a genuine mistake on our [Wise’s] part”. [...] was chat. Its impossible to reach this service by phone, and after 2 hours of frustration I finally found a way to log in and process my money transfer – which was IMMEDIATELY flagged for suspicious activity. I also tried to move a $150 balance to my linked bank checking account and got an error message that Wise wouldn’t allow this. NOTHING about this service has worked for me. EVERYTHING is not working or dysfunctional. Don’t even consider using this service.

results.title: Wise  is rated "Excellent" with 4.3 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
This is my only business bank account, and the closure will have a significant impact on my business operations. Payments, invoices, and day-to-day transactions will all be affected, causing unnecessary disruption.

It’s incredibly frustrating to have been a loyal customer for years, with a good banking history and no issues, only to have my account closed immediately after complying with their requested checks. I expected much better communication and consideration for long-standing customers.

July 3, 2026

Hi Robbie,

We understand your concern. As a regulated financial institution, that’s not a business we’re in, and you can see how we’re regulated in each country from here:  We follow a strict set of rules set out by regulatory agencies in every country we operate in – like the FCA in the UK. 

We know that having your account closed is frustrating, but we never do so without a reason. Account closure is usually a result of a conflict with our Terms of Use. Any ongoing payments on your account will be refunded back to the sender's account automatically. If you had money in your main account, then make sure to appeal from here:  so our team can start working on refunding you the money. [...] BEWARE I wish I could give a zero rating. Be cautious of this company that scammed me out of $49,000. After holding my funds for 14 days and requesting numerous documents, they eventually closed my account without warning and refunded the buyer, who had already received the goods. This caused financial strain and a month's worth of stress due to their incessant documentary demands, despite assuring me everything was okay. They labeled me "high-risk" without justification after previously saying it was fine to proceed. Their actions are unprofessional and inconsiderate, with many lawsuits and horror stories confirming their unreliability. It's frustrating that they consider me high-risk while others in the same industry handle larger transactions without issue—this seems very unfair.

results.title: My Wise Card Review - Blogger at Large
results.content:
### Account Setup Can Be Lengthy

While the application process is straightforward, the verification can take time. Wise requires proof of identity and sometimes proof of address, which is standard for financial services but can be frustrating if you’re hoping to use a physical card, instead of the online virtual card, I recommend applying at least two weeks before you plan to use it.

It costs a one-time fee of NZ$14 for a physical card. There are no monthly fees.

### Not a Credit Card

This might be obvious, but it’s worth emphasizing that the Wise card is a debit card, not a credit card. This means:

 No building credit history with your spending
 No rewards points or miles
 No purchase protection that many credit cards offer
 No buying stuff that you can’t afford!

results.title: Wise US Inc. | BBB Reviews | Better Business Bureau
results.content:
1 star I sent $25,000 USD via Wise on Dec 17, 2025, to an international recipient bank. The bank rejected the transfer on Dec 24, 2025 due to a currency mismatch. Wises system falsely showed it as successfully sent on Dec 29. I submitted the bank rejection, requested a return, and even had REMOVED submit a recall request, which REMOVED rejected.On Jan 26, 2026, REMOVED partially upheld my complaint, offering $25 compensation and suggesting a recall, but still refused to return the principal. I have filed complaints with REMOVED and REMOVED as well as the Attorney General in my state as well as theirs.Resolution requested: Immediate return of the full $25,000 USD with no fees. Wises delay and refusal to authorize the return is unacceptable. REMOVED if the money will be returned. [...] Date:12/17/2025

 1 star Ive been a Wise customer for quite some time and have generally found it reliable, especially while traveling. However, my recent experience with their customer service has been deeply disappointing. When I encountered an issue, the support team initially responded with templated replies that didnt address my concern. After several attempts, they finally agreed to take another lookthen went silent for weeks. When they eventually replied, their response was vague and unhelpful. For a company that handles peoples money, I expected a far higher level of support. This experience has eroded my trust in Wise, and Ill be switching to another service.
